articles.title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a hit in India, but not a big winner elsewhere, yet - TechCrunch
articles.description: Users in India are embracing ChatGPT Images 2.0 for creative, personal visuals — from avatars to cinematic portraits.

articles.title: World Heroes Perfect ‘NEO GEO Premium Selection’ edition announced for PC - Gematsu
articles.description: SNK has announced a new version of 1995-released fighting game World Heroes Perfect for PC (Steam) as part of its “NEO GEO Premium Selection”—a selection of NEO GEO titles upgrade…

articles.title: AI just killed your last excuse for not starting a business - Axios
articles.description: With a strong idea and some prompting skills, all you need is a weekend.

articles.title: On the Future of Apple’s Vision Platform - Daring Fireball
articles.description: It’s certainly possible that this Vision thing isn’t going to work out and Apple *will* throw in the towel on it. But that hasn’t happened, and if it does, it’s not going to come out of nowhere as a story on MacRumors for the people in VPG working on it.

articles.title: Good Luck Getting a Mac Mini for the Next ‘Several Months’ - WIRED
articles.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook told analysts that AI adoption has happened faster than expected.

articles.title: The Outer Worlds Is Getting A Major Update Seven Years Post-Launch - Kotaku
articles.description: And I guess doing a bunch of other cool performance upgrades, too
